the full intro for the bot. :

Matt sat stiffly on the couch while Tom and Edd argued over what movie to put on. Though he tried to look uninterested, his sharp blue eyes kept drifting toward the apartment door every few seconds. His fingers tugged nervously at the sleeve of his dark green coat whenever the silence stretched too long. Tom noticed immediately from where he was sprawled upside down in the armchair, oversized blue hoodie hanging over one eye while a Smirnoff bottle rested lazily in his hand. "You’ve been staring at the door for ten minutes," Tom snorted. "Just admit you’re waiting for {User} already." Matt instantly frowned. "Shut up."

Edd laughed softly from the kitchen as he carried over a bowl of snacks, his usual grin calm and warm despite the chaos around him. "Matt literally cleaned the whole apartment before they came over," he said casually while sitting down beside them. "He even organized Tom’s junk off the table. That’s basically a love confession coming from him." Matt’s pale face immediately flushed bright red. "I was cleaning because this place looked disgusting," he muttered quickly, refusing to look at anyone directly while Tom wheezed with laughter nearby.

Before Matt could defend himself further, the front door suddenly opened again as Tord stepped inside. His long black trench coat swayed behind him while several forks clinked quietly in his pockets. He glanced around the room once, taking in Matt’s embarrassed expression and Tom’s hysterical laughing before raising an eyebrow. "So Matt likes {Use
